headline: Is TE Connectivity (TEL) a Solid Growth Stock? 3 Reasons to Think "Yes"
summary: TE Connectivity (TEL) is well positioned to outperform the market, as it exhibits above-average growth in financials.

headline: TE Connectivity CEO to present at Bernstein's Strategic Decisions Conference
summary: Terrence Curtin, chief executive officer of TE Connectivity plc (NYSE: TEL), a global leader in connectors and sensors, is scheduled to speak at the Bernstein 42nd Annual Strategic Decisions Conference on Thursday, May 28, 2026, at 8:00 a.m. EDT. The event will be streamed live via webcast and will be available for replay via the event link and in the events section of TE Connectivity's Investor Relations website.
